articles.title: Cardano’s weekly development update has interesting insights for traders
articles.description: Cardano’s weekly development report highlighted efforts made by developers over the last week. On-chain performance remained decent, and price action turned bullish. Cardano’s [ADA] development activity took a back seat for the majority of last week as it went sideways. However, the graph managed to register a spike on 16 March, after which it once […]

articles.title: Microsoft Edge’s Unreleased Surprise: An Integrated Ethereum Wallet in Early Development
articles.description: Microsoft is reportedly developing a built-in Ethereum crypto wallet for its Edge browser, enabling users to send and receive cryptocurrencies and NFTs without additional extensions. Currently, in a limited testing phase, the wallet is a non-custodial solution, giving users complete control over their funds. According to a report by BleepingComputer, this experimental feature of the […]
